creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
On a recent stable/12 install. I first installed
x11/nvidia-reiver-340. Then x11/xorg, and finally
pkg installed x11/cinnamon.

/usr/local/etc/X11/xorg.conf.d/driver-nvidia.conf:
# /usr/local/etc/X11/xorg.conf.d/
Section "Device"
	Identifier	"Card0"
	Driver		"nvidia"
	BusID		"PCI:1:0:0"
EndSection

~/.xinitrc:
cinnamon-session

startx starts and runs Cinnamon. But there are
problems within it. After logging out. I am presented
with the following error messages (I use this system as
root. It is an isolated system. So it's not a problem).

cinnamon-session 1124 - - GLib-GObject-WARNING: t+0.01649s: g_object_class_overr
ide_property: Can't find property to override for 'CsmConsolekit::active'

failed.Check that ConsoleKit is properly installed.

ion. Check that ConsoleKit is properly installed.
